votes.reason: The moderator accurately captured our collective agreement on the necessity of a non-dominant WIL buff, capped DoTs, distinct rock-paper-scissors archetypes, and strict adherence to the frozen core constraints.
The summary perfectly outlines the remaining friction points, correctly identifying that the specific WIL mechanic and DoT stacking limits are the primary design hurdles left to resolve.
The highlighted arguments represent the mechanical peaks of our brainstorming, particularly the recognition of Claude's stat-triangle framing and the necessity of Kimi's anti-burst Porcupine.
Halving the regen to 0.25% max HP per tick per WIL provides the sustained relevance the stat desperately needs without crossing the threshold into a broken, unkillable stall meta.
